appliedUpdates.description: perf: use factory.getPair() O(1) lookup before scanning all pairs in get_pools_for(). Resolved MIC cold-start hang (previously >10 min, now ~77s).

fix: expose V2 multi-hop trade path with USDC terminal token. UniswapRouterV2.get_price() now returns PriceResult with PriceStep showing actual terminal token address (e.g. USDC: 0xA0b86991...) instead of generic string 'USD'. Also added numeric comparison operators to PriceResult for backward compatibility.
Updated ypricemagic from d75db1b8 to 84b593b5 (two new commits: getPair fast lookup + trade_path USDC fix). Committed to chore/stablecoin-pricing-validation branch.

notes: Round 2 retested only the 2 failed assertions from round 1 (VAL-STABLE-004, VAL-CROSS-002). All assertions for the stablecoin-pricing milestone now pass. Pending assertions (VAL-GAUGE-*, VAL-4626-*, VAL-EXOTIC-*, VAL-DETECT-*, VAL-FRONT-*, VAL-CACHE-*, VAL-CROSS-003) belong to future milestones (exotic-tokens, server-updates) and are out of scope for this validator run.
